name: ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under ICICI Bank reward programme terms
milestoneBenefits: 2,000 reward points on spending Rs 2,00,000 and 1,000 reward points each time Rs 1,00,000 spend is crossed thereafter in an anniversary year, capped at 10,000 points per year
additionalBenefits: 2 reward points on every Rs 100 spent except fuel
1 reward point on every Rs 100 spent on utilities and insurance
25% discount on BookMyShow and INOX movie tickets, capped at Rs 100, twice per month
One complimentary railway lounge visit per quarter
1% fuel surcharge waiver at HPCL petrol pumps

salaried: Minimum annual income as per ICICI Bank credit card eligibility
selfEmployed: Minimum annual income as per ICICI Bank credit card eligibility
